facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Elias Vale, Mara Sable, Naia Thorn topside; temporary survival leadership over Lio and three trapped workers below; Derren Holt and Benn separated elsewhere in the mine

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: What began as an unofficial rescue has become a trapped-survivor crisis below South Third, with collapse damage, severed support line and lower bridge, massing shardmice, and a deep bell from an old space that should not connect to this level

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Cut off from the surface, little gear, no usable lamp, minimal water, injured survivors, unstable stone, hostile shardmice, and guild rescue priorities that may abandon lower survivors

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Keep himself and four trapped workers alive by moving toward the only airflow/open-space route before shardmice overrun the pocket

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: South Third auxiliary, trapped in a collapse pocket below the lower galleries near a low opening with airflow and possible deeper open space

facts.subject: protagonist
facts.object: Unranked, unlicensed salvage runner trapped below after a rescue descent; carrying a pry bar, damaged satchel, damaged boot, destroyed lamp, and an undertrained structural echo-sense he does not fully trust
